title: Improve score 45425 feedback evaluation with 60d random-50 sampling

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started implementation. Scope: add --max-samples/--sample-seed for feedback eval, MCP passthrough params, preserve backward compatibility, then run targeted tests and attempt baseline 60d random-50 run for scorecard 1039 score 45425. Constraint: no champion promotion.

- Wired sampling into both FeedbackEvaluation and accuracy-with-FeedbackItems path
- Added MCP  params: max_feedback_samples + sample_seed and CLI passthrough for sync/background/bulk feedback runs
- Preserved backward compatibility when new params are omitted
- Added/updated tests; targeted pytest passed (21 passed).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented code changes on branch chore/plx-3170f4-feedback-sampling:
- Added CLI options --max-samples and --sample-seed to plexus evaluate feedback
- Wired sampling into both FeedbackEvaluation and accuracy-with-FeedbackItems path
- Added MCP plexus_evaluation_run params max_feedback_samples + sample_seed and CLI passthrough for sync/background/bulk feedback runs
- Preserved backward compatibility when new params are omitted
- Added/updated tests; targeted pytest passed (21 passed).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Baseline execution attempt started with local CLI command: python -m plexus.cli evaluate feedback --scorecard 1039 --score 45425 --days 60 --max-samples 50. The run launched and created evaluation record f7e38287-ef46-4129-8900-734afcf868e2, but emitted extremely high-volume per-item logs in foreground. Stopped interactive run to avoid terminal flooding; no champion promotion actions were performed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Committed implementation on branch chore/plx-3170f4-feedback-sampling at commit 3dbfcd445.

Validation run:
- pytest -q plexus/cli/evaluation/feedback_integration_test.py plexus/Evaluation_feedback_test.py
- Result: 21 passed, 1 deselected

No champion promotion operations were executed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting baseline run for scorecard 1039 / score 45425 with 60-day window and 50-sample cap (no champion promotion). Command will run in background; will log evaluation ID and final metrics (AC1/accuracy/precision/recall) when complete.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Identified root cause for 100% errors: metadata was being read from row.columns.metadata only, while FeedbackItems provides metadata as a top-level dataframe column. Patched AccuracyEvaluation row extraction to prefer row.metadata with fallback to columns.metadata. Re-ran targeted tests: plexus/Evaluation_feedback_test.py passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Observed run d50e0c75-bb88-417e-8f70-6273b8dd74c6 stalled at 39/50. Starting a fresh baseline run to obtain a completed baseline evaluation ID for dashboard comparisons.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented the no-fallback RCA fix path: feedback-backed accuracy now uses top-level metadata, per-item score execution has a hard timeout, Plexus resolves Biblicus RCA from ../Biblicus editable install, and focused regression tests were added for metadata precedence and timeout recovery.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Corrected the Biblicus branch mismatch: switched ../Biblicus to main, reinstalled editable biblicus 1.10.0, restored max_exemplars support in Plexus RCA, and launched validation evaluation 88025217-f490-4856-af58-4d0109c21936 using baseline b8b46fd5-93de-4502-a60f-c5e9beb1a4dc.
